name: Immovable
description:
This rune utilizes magical principles to manipulate gravity and turn you into an immovable object.

Activate(1 Action) (manipulate)

Frequency once per day

Effect Your armor anchors you in place, even defying gravity, rendering you Immobilized until you Dismiss the Activation. While you're immobilized in this way, you can be moved only if a creature succeeds at a DC 40 Athletics check check to Force Open your armor. You can also be moved if 8,000 pounds of pressure are placed upon you, though this is likely fatal.
